build.note: Next build completed successfully after fixing filesystem permissions for .next trace.

audit.note: Moderate vulnerabilities remain tracked; high and critical are zero.

resolvedFindings.title: .json route directories misclassified as JSON files
resolvedFindings.resolution: Added explicit JSON route directory policy and check:json that parses files only while allowlisting intentional Next App Router .json route directories.

resolvedFindings.title: Runtime/build artifacts present during audit
resolvedFindings.resolution: Cleaned build artifacts before packaging and updated package to include check:json in check:local.

resolvedFindings.title: Audit report write permission error
resolvedFindings.resolution: Removed stale root-owned report and patched audit report writer to unlink old report before writing.

resolvedFindings.title: Next build .next/trace permission error
resolvedFindings.resolution: Fixed filesystem ownership and re-ran build successfully.
